ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "diabetic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the patient is diabetic (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "first_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's first visit */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last visit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_insurance" TEXT /* Medical insurance details of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the record belongs to */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "pregnancies" INTEGER /* Number of pregnancies (for female patients) */,
  "plasma_glucose" REAL /* Plasma glucose concentration (mg/dL) */,
  "diastolic_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "triceps_thickness" INTEGER /* Triceps skin fold thickness (mm) */,
  "serum_insulin" INTEGER /* 2-Hour serum insulin (mu U/ml) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index (BMI, weight in kg/(height in m)^2) */,
  "diabetes_pedigree" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function (a function which scores likelihood of diabetes based on family history) */,
  "diabetic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the patient is diabetic (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "systolic_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Total cholesterol levels (mg/dL) */,
  "hdl_cholesterol" INTEGER /* HDL cholesterol levels (mg/dL) */,
  "ldl_cholesterol" INTEGER /* LDL cholesterol levels (mg/dL) */,
  "triglycerides" INTEGER /* Triglyceride levels (mg/dL) */,
  "a1c_level" REAL /* HbA1c levels (percentage) */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medications the patient is currently taking */,
  "doctor_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made by the doctor during the visit */,
  "next_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled visit */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status or risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
column_names: Gender of the patient (e.g., Male, Female, Other)
Indicator of whether the patient is diabetic (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Date of the patient's first visit
Date of the patient's last visit
